## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, status codes, or screenshots if relevant.

## Environment

- SDK version (if applicable): `@keylightdigital/nexus@`
- Runtime / language: Node.js / Python / Browser
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem here (logs, request/response bodies, etc.).
